name: Churchill Capital Corp XI
business: Churchill Capital Corp XI is a blank check company incorporated as a Cayman Islands exempted company formed for the purpose of effecting a business combination with one or more businesses. As of the date of this Report, it has not selected any specific Business Combination target and has generated no operating revenues.

catalysts.sentence: We have until December 18, 2027 (24 months from the closing of the Initial Public Offering or 27 months from the closing of the Initial Public Offering if we have executed a letter of intent, agreement in principle or definitive agreement for an initial business combination within 24 months from the closing of the Initial Public Offering), or until such (x) earlier date as our Board may approve or (y) later date as our shareholders may approve, pursuant to the Amended and Restated Articles, to consummate the Business Combination.
